commonQueries/$queryId.description: Read-only queries for wallet balances and swap quotes. Supports SOL/USDC/SPL token balance lookups, Jupiter swap quotes, and Meteora dynamic bonding curve quotes.

operationDetails.read: Anyone can use these queries: (1) Balance queries - check SOL, USDC, or any SPL token balance for any wallet address. (2) Jupiter swap quotes - get expected output amounts for token swaps via Jupiter aggregator. (3) Meteora swap quotes - get expected output amounts for Meteora dynamic bonding curve pools.

solBalance.description: Get SOL balance for a wallet address in lamports (1 SOL = 1,000,000,000 lamports). Pass walletAddress as parameter.

usdcBalance.description: Get USDC balance for a wallet address in base units (1 USDC = 1,000,000 base units with 6 decimals). Pass walletAddress as parameter.

tokenBalance.description: Get balance for any SPL token mint for a wallet address. Pass walletAddress and tokenMint as parameters. Returns balance in the token's smallest units based on its decimals.

jupiterSwapQuote.description: Get a Jupiter swap quote for exchanging tokens. Pass inputMint (token to sell, use @constants.SOL for native SOL), outputMint (token to buy), and amount (in smallest units like lamports). Returns the expected output amount.

meteoraSwapQuote.description: Get a Meteora dynamic bonding curve swap quote. Pass tokenMintAddress (the pool's base token), tokenToSwapInMintAddress (token to swap in, use @constants.SOL for native SOL), and tokenAmount (in smallest units). Returns the expected output amount.

profiles/$profileId.description: User profile for StudyBeats AI. One per wallet. Readable by any authenticated user; only the owner (address == @user.address) can create/update/delete.

operationDetails.read: Any authenticated user (wallet connected) can read profiles. Shows all fields.
operationDetails.create: Authenticated users only. The address field must equal @user.address (users create only their own profile). createdAt is Unix seconds.
operationDetails.update: Owner only (existing address must equal @user.address). The address field cannot be changed to another wallet.

materials/$materialId.description: An uploaded study document (pdf/docx/txt/text). Owner-scoped: only uploadedBy == @user.address can read/create/update/delete.

operationDetails.create: Authenticated users only. uploadedBy must equal @user.address. createdAt is Unix seconds.
operationDetails.update: Owner only. uploadedBy cannot be reassigned to another wallet.

songs/$songId.description: An AI-generated educational song (placeholder data for MVP; generation engine deferred). Owner-scoped by createdBy.

operationDetails.create: Authenticated users only. createdBy must equal @user.address. durationSec is required (pass 0 for placeholders). audioUrl/lyrics/coverUrl are optional placeholders. createdAt is Unix seconds. Optional: lyricsTimestamps (JSON array of {line,tSec} for synced lyrics), generationError (human-readable error message for retry UX).
operationDetails.update: Owner only. createdBy cannot be reassigned to another wallet. lyricsTimestamps and generationError are optional and updatable by the owner.

playlists/$playlistId.description: A user-created playlist. Owner-scoped by createdBy. Song membership is stored in the playlistSongs subcollection.

operationDetails.create: Authenticated users only. createdBy must equal @user.address. Add songs via the playlistSongs subcollection. createdAt is Unix seconds.
operationDetails.update: Owner only. createdBy cannot be reassigned to another wallet.

playlists/$playlistId/playlistSongs/$ent.description: A song entry within a playlist. Owner is inherited from the parent playlist (createdBy == @user.address). Use $entryId = songId to keep one entry per song.

operationDetails.read: Owner of the parent playlist only.
operationDetails.create: Owner of the parent playlist only (playlist.createdBy == @user.address). songId references a song; position orders the entry; addedAt is Unix seconds.
operationDetails.update: Owner of the parent playlist only (e.g. to reorder position).
operationDetails.delete: Owner of the parent playlist only (removes the song from the playlist).

favorites/$favoriteId.description: A favorited song for a user. Owner-scoped by userId.

operationDetails.create: Authenticated users only. userId must equal @user.address. songId references a song document. createdAt is Unix seconds.
operationDetails.update: Owner only. userId cannot be reassigned to another wallet.

studySessions/$sessionId.description: A focus/study session grouping songs. Owner-scoped by createdBy. Song membership is stored in the sessionSongs subcollection.

operationDetails.create: Authenticated users only. createdBy must equal @user.address. Add songs via the sessionSongs subcollection. createdAt is Unix seconds. Optional Learning Package fields: materialId (source material), status ('generating'|'ready'|'failed'), shortSummary, detailedSummary, keyConcepts (JSON array), flashcards (JSON array of {question,answer}), quiz (JSON array of {question,options,answerIndex,explanation}).
operationDetails.update: Owner only. createdBy cannot be reassigned to another wallet. Optional Learning Package fields can be updated by the owner.

studySessions/$sessionId/sessionSongs/$e.description: A song entry within a study session. Owner is inherited from the parent session (createdBy == @user.address). Use $entryId = songId to keep one entry per song.

operationDetails.read: Owner of the parent session only.
operationDetails.create: Owner of the parent session only (session.createdBy == @user.address). songId references a song; position orders the entry; addedAt is Unix seconds.
operationDetails.update: Owner of the parent session only (e.g. to reorder position).
operationDetails.delete: Owner of the parent session only (removes the song from the session).

history/$historyId.description: Playback history entry. Owner-scoped by userId; immutable once created.

operationDetails.create: Authenticated users only. userId must equal @user.address. playedAt is Unix seconds.
operationDetails.update: Operation disallowed. History entries are immutable once recorded.
operationDetails.delete: Owner only (userId == @user.address) can remove their own history entries.
